Patch Set 4:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 4:

Since this patch only skips tests for certain server versions, there is no reason to run all test groups for this patch. Thus, I've added the 'trivial' test parameter to run a minimal set of testing and used the testlist to make sure the test suite modified is run.

Patch Set 4:

Code-wise looks good to me.

commit.subject: LU-7044 test: Skip sanityn test_77e/77f/77g
commit.message:
LU-7044 test: Skip sanityn test_77e/77f/77g

Skip sanityn test_77e/77f/77g if server is older than 2.7.58

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanityn

Change-Id: Ic2d93d74027d66f4471a4916cf35c830fd4225bb
Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <wei3.liu@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/19054
Tested-by: Jenkins

Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
